function \{ Exclude\+On = 1

Name = "{}\+AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+apply\+\_\+environment\+\_\+event\+\_\+step"{}, "{}\+Adds a step to an event to apply an environment preset."{}

In = "{}\+HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Event"{}, "{}\+The event to add on to."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Env\+Name"{}, "{}\+The name of the environment preset to apply, of the form Env\+List/\+\+Env\+Name."{} In = "{}\+U8"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Is\+Dynamic"{}, "{}\+If nonzero, any variables in the environment are polled every frame."{}

Return\+Type = "{}\+S32"{}, "{}\+Returns 1 on success."{}

Discussion = "{}\+Applies the specified environment preset to the current HDIGDRIVER."{} \} \Hypertarget{_p_s_vita_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_ac142c3cb8135a9660daf7a21bacbaf74}\index{mss.h@{mss.h}!AIL\_add\_cache\_sounds\_event\_step@{AIL\_add\_cache\_sounds\_event\_step}}

{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{_p_s_vita_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_ac142c3cb8135a9660daf7a21bacbaf74} 
\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a235a247db09029da98f7e6cb5bdec89b}{DXDEC}} \doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_iggy_2include_2rr_core_8h_addabe99542b741b3d577bf48f3d8a44e}{S32}} \doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a29c5894c9cf854131166e33b5754aa75}{AILCALL}} AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+cache\+\_\+sounds\+\_\+event\+\_\+step (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a5432bb82752ff6f0ad50eb1e400840be}{HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT}}}]{i\+\_\+\+Event}{, }\item[{\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_common_2zlib_2zconf_8h_a2c212835823e3c54a8ab6d95c652660e}{const}} char \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{bank\+Name}{, }\item[{\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_common_2zlib_2zconf_8h_a2c212835823e3c54a8ab6d95c652660e}{const}} char \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{i\+\_\+\+Sounds}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}

function \{ Exclude\+On = 1

Name = "{}\+AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+cache\+\_\+sounds\+\_\+event\+\_\+step"{}, "{}\+Adds a step to an event to load a list of sounds in to memory for play."{}

In = "{}\+HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Event"{}, "{}\+The event to add on to."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}bank\+Name"{}, "{}\+The bank filename containing all of the sounds."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Sounds"{}, "{}\+A list of colon separated sounds to load from the bank file."{}

Return\+Type = "{}\+S32"{}, "{}\+Returns 1 on success."{}

Discussion = "{}\+In general events are not allowed to hit the disk in order to prevent unexpected hitching during         gameplay. In order to facilitate that, sounds need to be preloaded by this event. Each cache step can only         load sounds from a single bank file, so for multiple bank files, multiple steps will be needed.          In order to release the data loaded by this event, AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+uncache\+\_\+sounds\+\_\+event\+\_\+step() needs to         be called with the same parameters.          If you are using Miles\+Event, the data is refcounted so the sound will not be freed until all         samples using it complete."{} \} \Hypertarget{_p_s_vita_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_ac724ecfdd57ef203b1c65b07233c8b97}\index{mss.h@{mss.h}!AIL\_add\_clear\_state\_event\_step@{AIL\_add\_clear\_state\_event\_step}}

function \{ Exclude\+On = 1

Name = "{}\+AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+comment\+\_\+event\+\_\+step"{}, "{}\+Adds a step that represents a comment to the user of the editing tool."{}

In = "{}\+HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Event"{}, "{}\+The event to add on to."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Comment"{}, "{}\+A string to display in the editing tool."{}

Return\+Type = "{}\+S32"{}, "{}\+Returns 1 on success."{}

Discussion = "{}\+This event is ignored in the runtime, and only exist for editing convenience."{} \} \Hypertarget{_p_s_vita_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a23f3f89e869230e495bebfa333a49a13}\index{mss.h@{mss.h}!AIL\_add\_control\_sounds\_event\_step@{AIL\_add\_control\_sounds\_event\_step}}

function \{ Exclude\+On = 1

Name = "{}\+AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+control\+\_\+sounds\+\_\+event\+\_\+step"{}, "{}\+Adds a step to an event to control sample playback by label."{}

In = "{}\+HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Event"{}, "{}\+The event to add on to."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Labels"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ A comma seperated list of labels to control."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Marker\+Start"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ If exists, sets the loop start to the marker\textquotesingle{}s offset."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Marker\+End"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ If exists, sets the loop end to the marker\textquotesingle{}s offset."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Position"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ If exists, sets the current playback position to the marker\textquotesingle{}s offset."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Preset\+Name"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ The name of the preset to apply, of the form Bank/\+\+Preset\+List/\+\+Preset\+Name."{} In = "{}\+U8"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Preset\+Apply\+Type"{}, "{}\+If nonzero, the preset is applied dynamically(the variables are polled every frame)."{} In = "{}\+U8"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Loop\+Count"{}, "{}\+If the loop count is not to be affected, pass MILES\+\_\+\+CONTROL\+\_\+\+STEP\+\_\+\+IGNORELOOP. Otherwise, the sample\textquotesingle{}s loop count will be set to this value."{} In = "{}\+U8"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Type"{}, "{}\+The control type requested. See \$\+MILES\+\_\+\+CONTROL\+\_\+\+STEP\+\_\+\+TYPE."{}

Return\+Type = "{}\+S32"{}, "{}\+Returns 1 on success."{}

Discussion = "{}\+Controls playback of current instances. The sounds are matched either on name or label. If         i\+\_\+\+Labels is null, all sounds will be controlled.         "{} \} \Hypertarget{_p_s_vita_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a072f18149a955e2581e8d69a99c80adf}\index{mss.h@{mss.h}!AIL\_add\_enable\_limit\_event\_step@{AIL\_add\_enable\_limit\_event\_step}}

\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a235a247db09029da98f7e6cb5bdec89b}{DXDEC}} \doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_iggy_2include_2rr_core_8h_addabe99542b741b3d577bf48f3d8a44e}{S32}} \doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a29c5894c9cf854131166e33b5754aa75}{AILCALL}} AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+persist\+\_\+preset\+\_\+event\+\_\+step (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a5432bb82752ff6f0ad50eb1e400840be}{HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT}}}]{i\+\_\+\+Event}{, }\item[{\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_common_2zlib_2zconf_8h_a2c212835823e3c54a8ab6d95c652660e}{const}} char \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{i\+\_\+\+Preset\+Name}{, }\item[{\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_common_2zlib_2zconf_8h_a2c212835823e3c54a8ab6d95c652660e}{const}} char \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{i\+\_\+\+Persist\+Name}{, }\item[{\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_common_2zlib_2zconf_8h_a2c212835823e3c54a8ab6d95c652660e}{const}} char \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{i\+\_\+\+Labels}{, }\item[{\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_iggy_2include_2rr_core_8h_a4cf449757e2437251edcf54b8d85e36d}{U8}}}]{i\+\_\+\+Is\+Dynamic}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}

\begin{DoxyVerb}function
{
    ExcludeOn = 1

    Name = "AIL_add_persist_preset_event_step", "Adds a preset that applies to current sound instances, and continues to be applied to new sounds as they are started."
    In = "HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT", "i_Event", "The event to add on to."
    In = "const char*", "i_PresetName", "The name of the preset, of the form PresetList/PresetName. See discussion."
    In = "const char*", "i_PersistName", "The name of this persisted preset, for future removal."
    In = "const char*", "i_Labels", "The labels to apply this preset to."
    In = "U8", "i_IsDynamic", "If nonzero, the preset polls its variables every frame."

    ReturnType = "S32", "Returns 1 on success."

    Discussion = "Defines a preset by name that remains in the system, testing against all started sounds for label match. If a
        match occurs, then the preset is applied to the new sound, before the preset specified in the startsound step itself.

        In order to remove a persisted preset, refer to it by name, but leave all other parameters null.

        Example:
\end{DoxyVerb}


Persist a preset for players. AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+persist\+\_\+preset\+\_\+event\+\_\+step(h\+Event, , {\ttfamily "{}Bank/\+\+Player\+Effects/\+\+Underwater}"{}, \`{}"{}Underwater{\ttfamily "{}, }"{}player\`{}"{});

Remove the above preset. AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+persist\+\_\+preset\+\_\+event\+\_\+step(h\+Event, 0, {\ttfamily "{}Underwater}"{}, 0);"{} \} \Hypertarget{_p_s_vita_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_af0f34116bcfb3370ab5b95cc9e5cf0ca}\index{mss.h@{mss.h}!AIL\_add\_ramp\_event\_step@{AIL\_add\_ramp\_event\_step}}

function \{ Exclude\+On = 1

Name = "{}\+AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+sound\+\_\+limit\+\_\+event\+\_\+step"{}, "{}\+Adds a step that defines the maximum number of playing sounds per label."{}

In = "{}\+HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Event"{}, "{}\+The event to add on to."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Sound\+Limits"{}, "{}\+A string of the form \`{}"{}label count:\+anotherlabel count\`{}"{}."{}

Return\+Type = "{}\+S32"{}, "{}\+Returns 1 on success."{}

Discussion = "{}\+Defines limits for instances of sounds on a per label basis. Sounds with multiple labels         must fit under the limits for all of their labels. By default sounds are not limited other than the         Miles max sample count."{} \} \Hypertarget{_p_s_vita_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_ae521b39f2841db0eceb18101331e56fc}\index{mss.h@{mss.h}!AIL\_add\_soundbank@{AIL\_add\_soundbank}}

}\item[{\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_iggy_2include_2rr_core_8h_a4cf449757e2437251edcf54b8d85e36d}{U8}}}]{i\+\_\+\+Select\+Type}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}

function \{ Exclude\+On = 1

Name = "{}\+AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+start\+\_\+sound\+\_\+event\+\_\+step"{}, "{}\+Adds a step to a given event to start a sound with the given specifications."{}

In = "{}\+HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Event"{}, "{}\+The event to add the step to."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Sound\+Names"{}, "{}\+The names and associated weights for the event step to choose from.         If there are multiple names listed, the sound will be chosen at random based on the given weights. This         string is of the form \textquotesingle{}\+Bank\+Name1/\+\+Sound\+Name1:\+\+Weight1:\+\+Bank\+Name2/\+\+Sound\+Name2:\+\+Weight2:\+\textquotesingle{} etc. The string must always         terminate in a \textquotesingle{}:\+\textquotesingle{}. Weight must be between 0 and 200. To provide a null sound to randomly choose to not play anything, use         an empty string as an entry."{}

In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Preset\+Name"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ The name of the preset, of the form \textquotesingle{}\+Preset\+List/\+\+Preset\+Name\textquotesingle{}"{} In = "{}\+U8"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Preset\+Is\+Dynamic"{}, "{}\+Nonzero if the preset should poll the value of variables every frame, instead of only when applied."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Event\+Name"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ The name of the event to execute upon completion of the sound, of the form \textquotesingle{}\+Preset\+List/\+\+Preset\+Name\textquotesingle{}"{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Start\+Marker"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ The name of a marker to use as the loop start point."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+End\+Marker"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ The name of a marker to use as the loop end point."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+State\+Var"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ The name of a variable to use for storing state associated with this start sound step."{} In = "{}char const\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Var\+Init"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ A list of variable names, mins, and maxes to use for randomizing the sound instance state."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Labels"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ A comma delimited list of labels to assign to the sound."{} In = "{}\+U32"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Streaming"{}, "{}\+If nonzero, the sound will be set up and started as a stream."{} In = "{}\+U8"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Can\+Load"{}, "{}\+If nonzero, the sound is allowed to hit the disk instead of only accessing cached sounds. If true, this might cause a hitch."{} In = "{}\+U16"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Delay"{}, "{}\+The minimum delay in ms to apply to the sound before start."{} In = "{}\+U16"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Delay\+Max"{}, "{}\+The maximum delay in ms to apply to the sound before start."{} In = "{}\+U8"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Priority"{}, "{}\+The priority to assign to the sound. If a sound encounters a limit based on its labels, it will evict any sound         with a priority strictly less than the given priority."{} In = "{}\+U8"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Loop\+Count"{}, "{}\+The loop count as per AIL\+\_\+set\+\_\+sample\+\_\+loop\+\_\+count."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Start\+Offset"{}, "{}\+[optional]\+ The name of the marker to use as the sound\textquotesingle{}s initial offset."{} In = "{}\+F32"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Vol\+Min"{}, "{}\+The min volume value to randomly select for initial volume for the sound. In Lin\+Loud."{} In = "{}\+F32"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Vol\+Max"{}, "{}\+The max volume value to randomly select for initial volume for the sound. In Lin\+Loud."{} In = "{}\+F32"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Pitch\+Min"{}, "{}\+The min pitch to randomly select from for initial playback. In s\+T."{} In = "{}\+F32"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Pitch\+Max"{}, "{}\+The max pitch to randomly select from for initial playback. In s\+T."{} In = "{}\+F32"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Fade\+In\+Time"{}, "{}\+The time to fade the sound in over. Interpolation is linear in loudness."{} In = "{}\+U8"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Eviction\+Type"{}, "{}\+The basis for deciding what sound will get kicked out if a limit is hit when trying to play this sound. See \$\+MILES\+\_\+\+START\+\_\+\+STEP\+\_\+\+EVICTION\+\_\+\+TYPE."{} In = "{}\+U8"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Select\+Type"{}, "{}\+The method to use for selecting the sound to play from the sound name list. See \$\+MILES\+\_\+\+START\+\_\+\+SOUND\+\_\+\+SELECTION\+\_\+\+TYPE."{}

Return\+Type = "{}\+S32"{}, "{}\+Returns 1 on success."{}

Discussion = "{}\+Adds an event that can start a sound. If the sound names list contains multiple entries, one will be selected         randomly based on the given weights and the selection type. Weights are effectively ratios for likelihood. A sound with 100 weight will be twice as likely         as a sound with 50 weight. Some times you may want to have an event that only $<$em$>$might$<$/\+em$>$ play a sound. To do this, add a empty sound name         with an associated weight.         "{} \} \Hypertarget{_p_s_vita_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_ace1c262d8995a031eeed7dffb1993921}\index{mss.h@{mss.h}!AIL\_add\_uncache\_sounds\_event\_step@{AIL\_add\_uncache\_sounds\_event\_step}}
\index{AIL\_add\_uncache\_sounds\_event\_step@{AIL\_add\_uncache\_sounds\_event\_step}!mss.h@{mss.h}}

function \{ Exclude\+On = 1

Name = "{}\+AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+uncache\+\_\+sounds\+\_\+event\+\_\+step"{}, "{}\+Adds a step to an event to free a list of sounds previously loaded in to memory for play."{}

In = "{}\+HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Event"{}, "{}\+The event to add on to."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}bank\+Name"{}, "{}\+The bank filename containing all of the sounds."{} In = "{}const char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Sounds"{}, "{}\+A list of colon separated sounds from the bank file to uncache."{}

Return\+Type = "{}\+S32"{}, "{}\+Returns 1 on success."{}

Discussion = "{}\+This event released sounds loaded via AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+cache\+\_\+sounds\+\_\+event\+\_\+step()"{} \} \Hypertarget{_p_s_vita_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_ad940c5c50c25cebedc859dd3228115d3}\index{mss.h@{mss.h}!AIL\_allocate\_bus@{AIL\_allocate\_bus}}

function \{ Exclude\+On = 1

Name = "{}\+AIL\+\_\+close\+\_\+event"{}, "{}\+Returns a completed event, ready for enqueueing in to the Miles\+Event system."{}

In = "{}\+HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT"{}, "{}i\+\_\+\+Event"{}, "{}\+The event to complete."{}

Return\+Type = "{}char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}"{}, "{}\+An allocated event string that can be passed to AIL\+\_\+next\+\_\+event\+\_\+step or enqueued in the         Miles\+Event system via AIL\+\_\+enqueue\+\_\+event."{}

Discussion = "{}\+The returned pointer must be deleted via AIL\+\_\+mem\+\_\+free\+\_\+lock(). Note that if the Miles\+Event system         is used, the event pointer must remain valid through the following \$\+AIL\+\_\+complete\+\_\+event\+\_\+queue\+\_\+processing call."{}

\} \Hypertarget{_p_s_vita_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_afc0572fc7f70eda2fcb0a0ee4091c9e2}\index{mss.h@{mss.h}!AIL\_close\_filter@{AIL\_close\_filter}}

\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a235a247db09029da98f7e6cb5bdec89b}{DXDEC}} \doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a5432bb82752ff6f0ad50eb1e400840be}{HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT}} \doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a29c5894c9cf854131166e33b5754aa75}{AILCALL}} AIL\+\_\+create\+\_\+event (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\doxymbox{\hyperlink{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_afed5b2f9cfdce0d76b8a9e307d336b91}{void}}}]{}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}

\begin{DoxyVerb}function
{
    ExcludeOn = 1

    Name = "AIL_create_event", "Creates an empty event to be filled with steps."

    ReturnType = "HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT", "An empty event to be passed to the various step addition functions, or 0 if out of memory."

    Discussion = "Primarily designed for offline use, this function is the first step in
        creating an event that can be consumed by the MilesEvent system. Usage is as follows:

        HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT hEvent = AIL_create_event();
\end{DoxyVerb}


misc add functions AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+start\+\_\+sound\+\_\+event\+\_\+step(h\+Event, ...); AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+control\+\_\+sounds\+\_\+event\+\_\+step(h\+Event, ...); etc \begin{DoxyVerb}        char* pEvent = AIL_close_event(hEvent);
\end{DoxyVerb}


Do something with the event \begin{DoxyVerb}        AIL_mem_free_lock(pEvent);

        Note that if immediately passed to AIL_enqueue_event(), the memory must remain valid until the following
        $AIL_complete_event_queue_processing.

        Events are generally tailored to the MilesEvent system, even though there is nothing preventing you
        from writing your own event system, or creation ui.
        "
}
\end{DoxyVerb}

\begin{DoxyVerb}function
{
    ExcludeOn = 1

    Name = "AIL_next_event_step", "Retrieves the next step in the event buffer, parsing it in to a provided buffer."

    In = "const U8*", "i_EventString", "The event returned by $AIL_close_event, or a previous call to $AIL_next_event_step"
    Out = "const EVENT_STEP_INFO*", "o_Step", "A pointer to the step struct will be stored here."
    In = "void*", "i_Buffer", "A working buffer for the function to use for parsing."
    In = "S32", "i_BufferSize", "The size in bytes of the working buffer."

    ReturnType = "U8 char*", "Returns 0 on fail or when the event string has been exhausted of steps. Otherwise, returns
        the string location of the next event step in the buffer."

    Discussion = "This function parses the event string in to a struct for usage by the user. This function should only be
        used by the MilesEvent system. It returns the pointer to the next step to be passed to this function to get the
        next step. In this manner it can be used in a loop:
\end{DoxyVerb}


Create an event to stop all sounds. HMSSEVENTCONSTRUCT h\+Event = \doxylink{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a9d061a142ec98d6ff818292a465ffa8b}{AIL\+\_\+create\+\_\+event()}; AIL\+\_\+add\+\_\+control\+\_\+sound\+\_\+event\+\_\+step(h\+Event, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 255, 3); char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} p\+Event = AIL\+\_\+close\+\_\+event(h\+Event);

char Event\+Buffer\+[4096]\+; EVENT\+\_\+\+STEP\+\_\+\+INFO\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} p\+Step = 0; char\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} p\+Current\+Step = p\+Event;

while (p\+Current\+Step) \{ p\+Step = 0; p\+Current\+Step = AIL\+\_\+next\+\_\+event\+\_\+step(p\+Current\+Step, \&p\+Step, Event\+Buffer, 4096); if (p\+Step == 0) \{ Error, or an empty event. If \$\+AIL\+\_\+last\+\_\+error is an empty string, then it was an empty event. break; \}

Handle event step. switch (p\+Step-\/\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}type) \{ default:\+ break; \} \}

AIL\+\_\+mem\+\_\+free\+\_\+lock(p\+Event); "{} \} \Hypertarget{_p_s_vita_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_a6190c9ea165da819b50abe99c636be2f}\index{mss.h@{mss.h}!AIL\_open\_digital\_driver@{AIL\_open\_digital\_driver}}
